text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe injures herself towards the end
of training, so I bring her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. This is all my fault... I was being
careless...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Wait... Why are...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's just... The infirmary has a lot of visitors
today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says that, but it looks completely empty to
me...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um, I'll be fine... Let's get back to training...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Besides, my injury's nothing serious...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I... appreciate you looking out for me, but...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the beds are all taken by the other
patients...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The beds look empty to me, so the patients must
be invisible to everyone but her...
choice_data_list: Let's sit and wait until a bed's free.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Okay... That should be all right...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right. I brought some coffee to drink
after training...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'll go get it...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Okay, thank you... I'm sorry for the trouble...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After drinking some coffee together, I have her
rest in an available bed.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you for understanding. Well then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly, a gust of cold air rushes past.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ah, wait... They're still... Stop!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry about that. My injury hurts, so I think I'll
just rest...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If you don't mind... could you bring me something
to drink?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
In the meantime, I'll... try to take care of things
here.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'll be fine... Hurry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She practically forces me out of the room. By the
time I return with a drink, she looks completely
exhausted...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hehe... They turned the lights off...
choice_data_list: Is this their way of telling us to go train?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. And they're cheering us on while they're at
it...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, everyone's decided to come along...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It seems like they're curious about our training...
choice_data_list: We'd better show them what we can do.
We'd better show them what we can do.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. Let's put in double the effort.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our training session, I realize that I don't see
any traces of her injury. It's as if it mysteriously
disappeared.
